page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d3s.8xlarge is a storage-optimized instance type designed for high-capacity data processing. It features 32 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. With a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio, each of the 32 vCPUs maps directly to a physical core, providing consistent compute performance without hyperthreading interference.

The defining characteristic of this instance is its massive local storage capacity, offering 190,696 GB of HDD storage. This makes it highly suitable for large-scale data storage and sequential processing workloads. The system is equipped with 128.0 GB of system memory, translating to 4.0 GB of RAM per core, which balances the compute resources with the storage footprint.

For connectivity, the instance provides a baseline network bandwidth of 40 Gbps, facilitating rapid data transfer across distributed environments. It operates on the KVM hypervisor. Given the massive HDD capacity and dedicated compute cores, this instance is qualitatively cost-efficient for high-density storage workloads, such as big data analytics, distributed file systems, and large-scale data warehousing, where sequential read/write performance and sheer volume are prioritized over random IOPS.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d3s.8xlarge is a storage-optimized server designed for high-capacity data workloads. It is powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz, delivering 32 dedicated physical cores on the x86_64 architecture with a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio. The instance is equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM, providing 4.0 GB of memory per core. Its primary feature is an extensive local storage capacity of 190,696 GB utilizing HDD technology, paired with a 40 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, this server offers a balanced compute-to-memory ratio alongside massive storage density. It is highly suited for sequential data processing, distributed file systems, big data analytics, and large-scale data warehousing where high-volume storage is required.
